zh.lifeSummary: 當King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd於1014年出生在威爾士安格萊阿福拉福時，他的父親Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons39歲，母親Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw40歲。他於1054年與Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1075年在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd于1014年出生在威尔士安格萊阿福拉福时，他的父亲Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons39岁，母亲Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw40岁。他于1054年与Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1075年在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Iago
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jago
meanings: Cornish: from a Cornish form of the Middle English personal name Jakke (see Jack ).

nameMeanings.name: Cynan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd was born in 1014, in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons, was 39 and his mother, Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw, was 40. He married Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin in 1054, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1075, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd est né en 1014, à Aberffraw, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin en 1054, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1075, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd 1014 in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons 39 und seine Mutter Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw 40. Er hat 1054 in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1075 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd è nato il nel 1014 nel Aberffraw, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin nel 1054, nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1075, nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: King Cynan ab Iago of Gwyneddが1014年にウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウで生まれた時，父Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britonsは39歳，母Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffrawは40歳であった。1054年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンでRagnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1075年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd(이)가 1014년 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1054년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1075년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd nasceu em 1014, em Aberffraw, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin em 1054, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1075, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd родился в 1014 г. в местности абирффрав, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin в 1054 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1075 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd nació en 1014, en Aberffraw, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Iago ab Idwal ap Meurig of Gwynedd King of the Britons, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Afandreg ferch Gweir of Aberffraw, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin en 1054, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1075, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 61 años.
